Aric 's Staff of Power XPValue: 12,000 G P Value: 75,000 1992 Fantasy Collector Card 22 Aric's version of this powerful staff is a variation of the staff of power. The following powers con­ sume one charge: continuallight ,fire burst, dark­ ness 5' radius, ray of enfeeblement, cone of cold , and ride the wind. Expending two charges will grant the following: shield 5' radius, globe of invulnerability, and lower resistance. In addition, the staff gives Aric a +2 bonus to his Armor Class and saving throws , and a +4 bonus to saving throws vs. alteration spe lls. Expending charges does not cause
[PDF_PAGE 255 | score=12] » .... of Won drousness Xr Value: 6,000 GPVa lue: 10,000 PoLYIIEDItON Ncwszine 48 The wand's effec ts are rarely decisive, sometimes helpful , and usually fun . It is besl introduced when a hostile wizard uses it against the adven­ turers. Each time the wand is used, the player rolls IdlOO to detennine what happens. The wand often backfire s, so the user rolls 1d4, and if" ' " is rolled, the effec t is reversed. CrealUre s conjured obe y the U SC T (or oppon ent if the effect is reversed); they disappear after six rounds . Inani­ male objects lasl until dispelled . Magical effects last for the listed duration or for six rounds. Max­ imum range is 60' unless noted otherwise. The OM is free 10
[PDF_PAGE 286 | score=12] , centipedes, with ringlike segments. In baUle, they do damage as a nonnal drove r's whip ( ld4 + 1 plus the victim m ust make a St reng th c heck or be knocked down, dropping held items or \.\Ieapons), but they have several additional useful prope rties. The metal whip resis ts being cut or broken (it wilt suffer up to 36 points of damage on a single round before pa rting - if it does, its magic is 10sl). Moreover , its touch ca n acl as a stone 10 flesh spell by utterance of a secret command word, affec ting both pet rified thinKS and natural stone (creating afleshy cylinder, as the spe ll) as though the wh ip was a 12th-level wizard. Thus , 108 cubic feel of stone can be affected per touc
[PDF_PAGE 41 | score=11] .. enemy as if wielded by an 8th- level ninja. The staff can dance as a bo stick, shakujo yari, or shikom i-zue-the form in which the owne r wishes it to fight, however, must be determined before the weapon is made to dance. When time runs out or il is recalled, the statT returns to the owncr. • It acts as a ring o/water walking. • Four times a week, the bearer of the staff can pass through stone or metal walls up to 3 feel thick. Oberon 's XP Value: 7,000 GP Value: 20,000 Monster Mythology Oberon's avatar carrie s an enchanted staff that can be used as a changestafJ once a day. of Oceans XP Value: 8,000 GP Va lue: 20,000 Kara·Tur Thi s is an ornate staff, laminated from many types ofv.-ood 
[PDF_PAGE 48 | score=11] Staff, Snake IIr inches in diameter and 5 pounds in weight. The object adheres to the end of the staff, and the wielde r need then only swing the staff in an overhand arc to release the missile towa rd a desired target. The missile leaves the staff on the downstroke of the overhand swing and travels in a low-rising trajectory, with the missile going I foot upward for every 10 feet traveled. Of course, the arc may be higher, or the missile aimed so as to travel nearly vertically. (In the laller case, reverse the arcing ratio so that I-foot of distance laterally is covered for every 10 feet of vertical rise.) The maximum range of such a missile is 180 feet, with limits of 60 feet and 120 feet 
[PDF_PAGE 125 | score=11] ,Sword. Genieblight all othe r genies, even other genies of the same elemental type, with the weapon's standard attack and damage bonus. Genieblight XP Value: 600 GP Value: 3,000 Land ofFatc These swords may be of any type. They grant a + I combat bonus to attack and damage rolls, and grant a +2 against any of the geniekind, including common genies, tasked genies, noble genies, jann, and even gens. Geniescourge XPValue: 800 GPVa lue: 4,000 Land of Fate These weapons grant a +2 bonus in combat, but provide a +) to attack and damage rolls against specific geniekind (dao, marid, efreeti or djinni). They may affect both common and noble ver­ sions, but affect all other genies, and even other gen
[PDF_PAGE 238 | score=11] , of Light XPValue: 50 G P Value: 250 Needle This odd and flexible wand is mad e of an unknown subs tance. I f struck against any hard object, it glows to 30-foot radiu s for one turn, then goes dark. It can be used as often as desired and has no charges. of Lightening XPValue: 1,000 GPVa lue: 7,500 DRJ.<iON Magazin e 35 This wand, whether directed at an opponent or oneself, will cause the operator to gradually become weightless. Once the wand is activated it cannot be stopped until the process is complete (5 rounds). Treat as gaseous form to see jf the victim is blown by air currents, although the victim will obviously not be able to pass through cracks or holes. of Lightnin g XP Value: 4,0
[PDF_PAGE 247 | score=11] ",Wand of Size Alteration of Size Alteration XP Value: 3,000 GP Value: 20,000 DUNGEON MAST E ~ Guide A wand of this sort cnables the wielder to cause any single creature of virtua lly any size to enlarge or diminish. Eithcr effcct causes a 50% change in size. Relative Strength an d power incrcascs or decreases proportionally , providing the weaponry cmployed is proportionate or usable. For humanoid creatures cnlarged, Strength is roughly proportional to that of a giant of correspond ing size. For exam­ ple, a humanoid enlarged to 9 feet tall is roughly equivalent to a hill giant (19 Strength), a 13-foot­ tall humanoid cquals a fire giant (22 Strength). The wand's powcr has a range of 10 feel
